eusan_nation_strings.eusan_nation_k4_composite_armorText4: I don't think the engineers fully appreciate how dreadfully difficult to service these armor arrays when it takes a hit. So much bolting and unbolting...
eusan_nation_strings.eusan_nation_electronic_warfare_suiteTex: Depending on the ship size, the ECM rating for frigates %s, destroyers %s, cruisers %s, and capital ships %s.
Reduces the chance for missiles launched by the ship to be affected by electronic counter-measures and flares by %s
Improved electronics increases missile maneuverability by %s, as well as significantly improving the guidance algorithm.
Also reduces the weapon range reduction due to superior enemy Electronic Warfare by %s.

The system processor periodically performs a background built-in-test(B-BIT), to check the status and calibration of the system. The system processor software is updated or reprogrammed as required from a memory loader verifier (MLV). The system processor uses two major software programs. The operational flight program (OFP) manages the receiver and transmitter functions, signal processing, and techniques generation. The mission data generator (MDG) contains the threat EID tables and the jamming techniques matrix for these threats.
eusan_nation_strings.eusan_nation_replika_cadreText3: Yes the replika cadre onboard have been working nonstop to repair the damage. Just yesterday we found out that the wiring for the port side compartments between frame 140 and 142 port side got severed but it did not show up on the diagnostics because rerouting systems kicked in. The LSTR units had to spend several hours crawling through the spaces to test, diagnose and repair it. They got banged up in the process so guess who has to fix them...
eusan_nation_strings.eusan_nation_engineering_designText4: For many in the Volksmarine, the sturdy spaceframes of our warships is the end result of several decades of vicious interstellar warfare between the Nation and the Empire. Hard won lessons learned in blood, progress earned through trial and error. Gestalt and Replika crews risking all for our victory. All officers of the Volksmarine should remember the sacrifices made then to get us here today.
eusan_nation_strings.eusan_nation_penrose_survey_equipmentTex: The combined surveying equipment in your fleet reduces the survey cost by %s
This reduces the supply usage by %s
It also reduce the expenditures of heavy machinery by %s

Once you have discovered a viable planet, your next objective is to plot a course to the planet. At the same time, you are to send a coded message about this discovery back to Heimat at the listed frequencies in Appendix B of the Survey Handbook. Once the message has been sent and course has been plotted, based on your flight time and timeframe, prepare your ship for possible atmospheric entry as required by survey regulations.
eusan_nation_strings.eusan_nation_missile_assembly_compartmen: Machinery? No fancy automated systems here. The replikas assemble the missiles and cranes send them to the ready service magazine area. Then they get loaded to the launchers. Not like the other powers with their fancy automated handling systems, we do things by hand.
eusan_nation_strings.eusan_nation_missile_advanced_flag_facil: Increases the command point recovery rate by %s when installed on the flagship.
Data links set. Fleet units are pinging back status and sensor pictures. Relaying updated data to network.
— Tactical Officer on the VM Genevieve
